experience.title: Information Technology Help Desk Specialist
experience.description: Diagnose and resolve technical hardware and software issues for incoming phone calls and emails while ensuring detailed documentation on all activity and communication with customers regarding their issue.

experience.title: Quality Assurance IT Analyst
experience.description: Display working ability to organize and follow complex and detailed technical procedures. Responsible for establishing and implementing quality assurance and compliance processes for the IT organization by defining, documenting, measuring, analyzing, and improving processes.

experience.title: Business Operations Analyst /Metrics Analyst /Department Administrative Support/ Supply Chain Assistant
experience.description: Responsible for providing accurate and detailed reporting to executive management daily monthly and quarterly metrics and reporting as well as any other requests from the team or other organizations.

experience.title: Customer Service Professional
experience.description: Answers incoming customer telephone calls in a courteous and professional manner. Responds to and investigates customer inquiries, concerns, orders and issues received via phone, fax, email, Shell Source, and EDI in a timely and courteous manner.
